# NFert

**N, P and K fertilization following Emilia-Romagna DPI 2026**

## Overview

`NFert` is an R package for calculating nitrogen, phosphorus and
potassium fertilization requirements in field and tree crops following
the **Disciplinari di Produzione Integrata (DPI) Emilia-Romagna**
(ed. 2026). It implements both the **method of the balance** (Allegato
2) and the **Scheda a dose Standard** method, mirroring the official
Fert_Office tool (v1.26, Febbraio 2026). It supports maximum allowed
doses (MAS), soil texture grouping, Olsen P and exchangeable K
availability, fertilization distribution planning (organic + mineral),
end-of-cycle soil P and K estimation and precision agriculture
(NDVI-based variable rate).

## Normative reference

- **DPI Emilia-Romagna** (2025–2026) – Norme Generali; Allegato 2
  (metodo del bilancio), Allegati 3, 4, 6, 7, 9; *Guida alla
  Fertilizzazione Minerale e Organica* (N, P, K)
- **FertDPI / Fert_Office** – strumento regionale; NFert riproduce la
  logica del bilancio azotato per uso in R
- **Reg. reg. 2/2024** – limiti MAS (Allegato 9); **Reg. reg. 3/2017** –
  utilizzazione agronomica degli effluenti e del digestato
- **Direttiva Nitrati (91/676/CEE)** – in ZVN limite 170 kg N/ha/anno da
  effluenti zootecnici; Reg. UE 2021/2115 (soglie minime efficienza)

## Features

- **Nitrogen balance (Allegato 2)**:
  [`N_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/N_balance.md)
  with A (crop demand), B1/B2 (soil fertility), C1/C2 (leaching), D
  (immobilization), E (previous crop residues), F (previous years’
  organics), Forg (current year organics), G (natural deposition).
  Supports `soil_seeding = "no-till"` (−3 kg/ha on b1),
  `greenhouse = TRUE` (+2 on D), automatic fold of negative E into D.
- **Phosphorus balance**:
  [`P_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/P_balance.md)
  with Olsen P classification
  ([`classify_P_olsen()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_P_olsen.md)),
  Arricchimento / Mantenimento / Riduzione strategy, texture-dependent
  weight at 30 cm and P immobilisation factor 1.6.
- **Potassium balance**:
  [`K_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/K_balance.md)
  with K availability class by texture
  ([`classify_K()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_K.md)),
  clay-driven leaching
  ([`K_leaching_by_clay()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/K_leaching_by_clay.md)).
- **Scheda a dose Standard**:
  [`scheda_N()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/dose_standard_N.md)
  and
  [`scheda_PK()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/dose_standard_PK.md)
  with the DPI 2026 catalogue of decrements and increments and MAS cap
  on N.
- **Fertilization distribution plan**:
  [`plan_distribution()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/plan_distribution.md)
  combines organic matrices (with DPI 2026 N efficiency by soil × dose ×
  sector) and mineral fertilisers (146-entry `concimi.table`), returns
  Eccesso/Deficit alerts and ZVN 170 kg N/ha check.
- **End-of-cycle soil dotation**:
  [`estimate_soil_P_end_of_cycle()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_soil_P_end_of_cycle.md)
  and
  [`estimate_soil_K_end_of_cycle()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_soil_K_end_of_cycle.md)
  for next-year planning.
- **Soil chemistry**:
  [`classify_pH()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_pH.md),
  [`classify_carbonate_tot()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_carbonate_tot.md),
  [`classify_carbonate_att()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_carbonate_att.md),
  [`classify_CEC()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_CEC.md),
  [`ratio_Mg_K()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/ratio_Mg_K.md),
  [`ratio_K_CEC()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/ratio_K_CEC.md),
  [`classify_SOM()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_SOM.md),
  [`max_SO_input()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/max_SO_input.md).
- **MAS (Massimali)**:
  [`get_MAS()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/get_MAS.md) and
  [`check_MAS()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/check_MAS.md)
  for maximum allowed N per crop (DPI 2026, RR 2/2024).
- **Precision agriculture**: NDVI-based variable rate (calibration curve
  and Holland & Schepers).

## Installation

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("mcroci/NFert")
```

See also the [pkgdown site](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/).

## Course lab workflow (companion teaching repo)

If you use the **lab-agricoltura-di-precisione** exercise scripts
together with this package, the mapping is:

| Exercise script | Main NFert entry points |
|----|----|
| `01_bilancio_N.R` | [`farm_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/farm_balance.md), [`N_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/N_balance.md) |
| `02_suolo_IDW.R` | interpolation outputs feed [`spatial_N_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/spatial_N_balance.md) via rasters |
| `03_bilancio_spaziale.R` | [`spatial_N_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/spatial_N_balance.md) |
| `04_NDVI_calibrazione.R` | [`compute_vi()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/compute_vi.md) |
| `05_NNI_singolo_scena.R` | [`estimate_biophysical()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_biophysical.md), [`compute_NNI_from_S2()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/compute_NNI_from_S2.md) |
| `06_NNI_serie_temporale.R` | [`estimate_biophysical()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_biophysical.md), [`crop_params_NNI()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/crop_params_NNI.md), NNI helpers |
| `07_prescrizione_VRT.R` | [`build_strip_prescription()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/build_strip_prescription.md) |
| `08_export_macchine.R` | [`export_prescription_all()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/export_prescription_all.md) |
| `09_figure_prescrizioni_metodi.R` | reads grids from step 07 (no new NFert calls) |
| `10_biophysical_mean_vs_pixel.R` | [`estimate_biophysical()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_biophysical.md) |

Install course dependencies once with
`source("esercitazioni/00_install_packages.R")` from the lab repository
root.

## Quick Start

``` r

library(NFert)

# Calculate nitrogen balance for a maize crop
maize_n_balance <- N_balance(
  expected_yield_tons_ha = 15,
  crop = "Mais trinciato (classe 700)",
  ccp = "Spring-summer crop 100–130 days",
  sand = 50,
  clay = 35,
  Ntot = 1.2,
  SOM = 1.2,
  CN = 9.5,
  oxygen_availability = "Normal",
  winter_rain = 160,
  start_spring_rain = 40,
  prev_crop = "Winter cereals straw removal",
  source = "Cattle slurry",
  fertorg_frequency = "every year",
  location = "Plain adjacent to urbanized areas",
  forg_quantity = 100
)

print(maize_n_balance)
```

## Main Functions

- [`N_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/N_balance.md):
  Main function for calculating comprehensive nitrogen balance
- [`calc_crop_N_demand()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calc_crop_N_demand.md):
  Calculate crop nitrogen requirements
- [`soil_fertility()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/soil_fertility.md):
  Estimate soil nitrogen availability
- [`leaching_loss()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/leaching_loss.md):
  Calculate nitrogen leaching losses
- [`calc_N_immobilization_loss()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calc_N_immobilization_loss.md):
  Estimate nitrogen immobilization
- [`organic_fertilization()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/organic_fertilization.md):
  Calculate nitrogen from organic fertilizers
- [`natural_contribution()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/natural_contribution.md):
  Estimate natural nitrogen deposition
- [`tri2()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/tri2.md) and
  [`tri3()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/tri3.md): Soil
  texture classification (USDA; tri3 maps to DPI groupings)
- [`get_MAS()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/get_MAS.md) and
  [`check_MAS()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/check_MAS.md):
  Maximum allowed doses (MAS) per crop (DPI 2026)
- [`calculate_N_fertilization()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calculate_N_fertilization.md):
  Final N dose from balance result
- [`estimate_N_rate_from_calibration_curve()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_N_rate_from_calibration_curve.md):
  NDVI-based rate estimation (calibration method)
- [`estimate_N_rate_from_holland_schepers()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_N_rate_from_holland_schepers.md):
  NDVI-based rate estimation (H&S method)

## Nitrogen balance (DPI Allegato 2)

N da apportare = **A** + **C** + **D** − **B** − **E** − **F** − **G**

- **A**: Fabbisogno della coltura (resa × coefficiente asportazione)
- **B**: Fertilità del suolo (N mineralizzabile dalla S.O. + N pronto)
- **C**: Perdite per lisciviazione (C1 autunno-inverno, C2 fine inverno)
- **D**: Immobilizzazione e dispersione
- **E**: N da precessione colturale (residui, leguminose, paglie)
- **F**: N da fertilizzazione organiche anni precedenti
- **G**: Apporti naturali (precipitazioni)

NFert computes the balance and then subtracts current-year organic N
(Forg) to give the mineral N to apply. In Nitrate Vulnerable Zones
(ZVN), the 170 kg N/ha/year limit from livestock effluents applies at
farm level.

## Documentation

See the package vignette for detailed examples and usage:

``` r

vignette("NFert")
```

To cite this package in publications, use:

``` r

citation("NFert")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`K_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/K_balance.md)
  : Potassium balance (DPI Emilia-Romagna 2026 metodo del bilancio)

- [`K_leaching_by_clay()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/K_leaching_by_clay.md)
  : K leaching by clay content

- [`N_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/N_balance.md)
  : Nitrogen Balance Calculation

- [`P_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/P_balance.md)
  : Phosphorus balance (DPI Emilia-Romagna 2026 metodo del bilancio)

- [`biophysical_to_NNI_inputs()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/biophysical_to_NNI_inputs.md)
  : Convert GPR biophysical outputs into NNI inputs (low-level helper)

- [`build_strip_prescription()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/build_strip_prescription.md)
  : Build a strip-by-strip prescription map from a field polygon

- [`calc_N_immobilization_loss()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calc_N_immobilization_loss.md)
  : Nitrogen Immobilization Loss Calculation

- [`calc_crop_K_demand()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calc_crop_K_demand.md)
  : Crop K2O demand

- [`calc_crop_N_demand()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calc_crop_N_demand.md)
  : Crop requirement estimation

- [`calc_crop_P_demand()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calc_crop_P_demand.md)
  : Crop P2O5 demand

- [`calc_soil_group_and_id_rag()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calc_soil_group_and_id_rag.md)
  : Soil Group and ID_Rag Determination

- [`calculate_N_fertilization()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/calculate_N_fertilization.md)
  : Calculate Nitrogen Fertilization Requirement

- [`cerzoo`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/cerzoo.md) :
  CERZOO example datasets (real field, ready to test the functions)

- [`check_MAS()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/check_MAS.md)
  : Check planned N against MAS

- [`classify_CEC()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_CEC.md)
  : Classify cation exchange capacity (CSC, meq/100 g) From Fert_Office
  v1.26 foglio Gri_K: \< 10 = bassa, 10-20 = media, \> 20 = alta.

- [`classify_K()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_K.md)
  : Classify exchangeable potassium availability

- [`classify_P_olsen()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_P_olsen.md)
  : Classify Olsen phosphorus availability

- [`classify_SOM()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_SOM.md)
  : Classify SO (soil organic matter) initial content by texture group

- [`classify_carbonate_att()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_carbonate_att.md)
  : Classify active carbonate

- [`classify_carbonate_tot()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_carbonate_tot.md)
  : Classify total carbonate (CaCO3 %)

- [`classify_pH()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/classify_pH.md)
  : Classify soil pH

- [`compute_NNI()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/compute_NNI.md)
  : Nitrogen Nutrition Index (NNI)

- [`compute_NNI_from_S2()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/compute_NNI_from_S2.md)
  : End-to-end Nitrogen Nutrition Index pipeline from Sentinel-2 L2A

- [`compute_vi()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/compute_vi.md)
  : Compute a vegetation index from a multi-band raster

- [`critical_N_curve()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/critical_N_curve.md)
  : Critical nitrogen curve parameters (Lemaire & Gastal 1997 framework)

- [`crop_params_NNI()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/crop_params_NNI.md)
  : Crop-specific parameters for the Nitrogen Nutrition Index pipeline

- [`diagnose_N_status()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/diagnose_N_status.md)
  : Diagnose crop N status from biomass and N content (NNI classes)

- [`dose_standard_N()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/dose_standard_N.md)
  [`scheda_N()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/dose_standard_N.md)
  : Scheda a dose Standard - Nitrogen (DPI Emilia-Romagna 2026)

- [`dose_standard_PK()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/dose_standard_PK.md)
  [`scheda_PK()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/dose_standard_PK.md)
  : Scheda a dose Standard - Phosphorus and Potassium (DPI 2026)

- [`estimate_N_rate_from_calibration_curve()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_N_rate_from_calibration_curve.md)
  : Nitrogen Rate Estimation from NDVI using Calibration

- [`estimate_N_rate_from_holland_schepers()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_N_rate_from_holland_schepers.md)
  : Estimate Nitrogen Rate using Holland & Schepers Method

- [`estimate_biophysical()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_biophysical.md)
  : GPR-based estimation of canopy biophysical variables from Sentinel-2
  L2A

- [`estimate_soil_K_end_of_cycle()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_soil_K_end_of_cycle.md)
  : Estimate end-of-cycle soil K2O content (ppm)

- [`estimate_soil_P_end_of_cycle()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/estimate_soil_P_end_of_cycle.md)
  : Estimate end-of-cycle soil P2O5 content (ppm)

- [`export_prescription()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/export_prescription.md)
  : Export a variable-rate prescription map for farm machinery

- [`export_prescription_all()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/export_prescription_all.md)
  : Export a prescription map in many formats at once

- [`farm_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/farm_balance.md)
  : Apply the NFert balance to every plot of a farm

- [`get_MAS()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/get_MAS.md) :
  Maximum Allowed Doses (MAS) per DPI Emilia-Romagna

- [`crop_en2it`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/i18n.md)
  [`prev_crop_en2it`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/i18n.md)
  [`source_en2it`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/i18n.md)
  [`modality_epoch_en2it`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/i18n.md)
  [`level_en2it`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/i18n.md) :
  English alias dictionaries for the NFert reference tables

- [`leaching_loss()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/leaching_loss.md)
  : Leaching Loss of Nitrogen

- [`list_crops()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/list_crops.md)
  : List all crops with both Italian and English names

- [`max_SO_input()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/max_SO_input.md)
  : Maximum annual organic matter input (t dry matter / ha)

- [`natural_contribution()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/natural_contribution.md)
  : Natural Nitrogen Contribution

- [`nfert_crop_pars_quefts()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/nfert_crop_pars_quefts.md)
  : Map NFert crop label to QUEFTS crop parameters (backward-compatible)

- [`nfert_en2it()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/nfert_en2it.md)
  : Translate an English alias into its canonical Italian NFert key

- [`nfert_it2en()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/nfert_it2en.md)
  : Translate an Italian NFert canonical key into its English alias

- [`nfert_to_quefts_biom()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/nfert_to_quefts_biom.md)
  : Build QUEFTS biomass list from NFert state and Sentinel-2 NNI

- [`nfert_to_quefts_crop()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/nfert_to_quefts_crop.md)
  : Translate NFert crop name into QUEFTS crop parameters

- [`nfert_to_quefts_soil()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/nfert_to_quefts_soil.md)
  : Translate NFert inputs into QUEFTS soil parameters

- [`nitrogen_from_previous_crop_residues()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/nitrogen_from_previous_crop_residues.md)
  : Nitrogen from previous crop residues

- [`nni_from_vi_empirical()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/nni_from_vi_empirical.md)
  : Empirical NNI from a vegetation index (no GPR models required)

- [`normalise_soil_group()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/normalise_soil_group.md)
  : Normalise a soil-group label across the three NFert conventions

- [`optimize_VR_DPI()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/optimize_VR_DPI.md)
  : Compliance-aware variable-rate nitrogen prescription

- [`organic_N_efficiency()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/organic_N_efficiency.md)
  : Organic nitrogen efficiency by material, soil texture and
  distribution (DPI)

- [`organic_fertilization()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/organic_fertilization.md)
  : Nitrogen Provided by Organic Fertilization

- [`organic_previous_years_N()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/organic_previous_years_N.md)
  : N from previous years' organic fertilization (term F in DPI balance)

- [`plan_distribution()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/plan_distribution.md)
  : Fertilization distribution plan

- [`ratio_K_CEC()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/ratio_K_CEC.md)
  : K/CSC ratio assessment (Fert_Office foglio Gri_K) \<0.1% basso;
  0.1-2.1 ottimale; 2.1-5.1 alto; ... (percentage of CSC)

- [`ratio_Mg_K()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/ratio_Mg_K.md)
  : Mg/K ratio assessment (Fert_Office foglio Gri_K) 0-0.1 basso;
  0.1-2.1 equilibrato; 2.1-5.1 alto; \>5.1 molto alto.

- [`resolve_ccp()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/resolve_ccp.md)
  :

  Resolve a `ccp` (crop calendar period) string with whitespace and dash
  normalisation

- [`resolve_crop()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/resolve_crop.md)
  : Resolve a crop name (Italian or English) to its canonical entry

- [`resolve_id_rag()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/resolve_id_rag.md)
  : Resolve a numeric ID_Rag from any soil-group label or clay/sand %

- [`run_app()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/run_app.md) :
  Launch the NFert Shiny web interface

- [`soil_K_availability()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/soil_K_availability.md)
  : Compute soil K availability terms for the K balance

- [`soil_P_availability()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/soil_P_availability.md)
  : Compute soil P availability terms (B1 / A mantenimento / B2) for the
  P balance

- [`soil_fertility()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/soil_fertility.md)
  : Calculate soil fertility parameters (B = B1 + B2 in DPI).

- [`spatial_N_balance()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/spatial_N_balance.md)
  : Spatially-explicit Nitrogen Balance

- [`tri2()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/tri2.md) : Soil
  Texture Class Determination

- [`tri3()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/tri3.md) : Soil
  Texture Class Determination (Simplified)

- [`variable_rate_N()`](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/reference/variable_rate_N.md)
  : Variable-rate nitrogen from balance + NDVI

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Farm-level balance and strip-prescription
  map](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/articles/farm-and-prescription-map.md):
- [N, P and K fertilization with NFert — DPI Emilia-Romagna
  2026](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/articles/NFert-PK-and-distribution.md):
- [Nitrogen Fertilization Management with NFert: A Comprehensive
  Guide](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/articles/NFert.md):
- [Prescription map worked example: NDVI, calibration curve,
  grid](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/articles/prescription-map-example.md):
- [Remote Sensing Diagnosis: multi-index VIs and Nitrogen Nutrition
  Index](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/articles/remote-sensing-diagnosis.md):
- [Spatial Nitrogen Balance and Variable-Rate
  Prescription](https://mcroci.github.io/NFert/articles/spatial-balance.md):
